name: Easy Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups mixed dried fruit (half currants and half raisins)
2 egg whites or equivalent, lightly beaten
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple sauce, water, sugar, and dried fruit in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 20 minutes, then allow to cool.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C). Line a 6-inch round cake tin with greaseproof paper.
3. Mix the egg whites into the fruit mixture. Sift the flour and baking powder into it as well. If needed, add water to create a stiff batter.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared tin and sprinkle the top with brown sugar.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean (or mostly clean).
